mapper.select: SELECT s.*, m.name as material_name, m.material_code, m.unit, m.spec, c.category_name as category_name, l.name as location_name, z.name as zone_name FROM wms_stock_item s LEFT JOIN wms_material m ON s.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN wms_category c ON m.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN wms_location l ON s.location = l.id LEFT JOIN wms_location z ON l.parent_id = z.id ORDER BY s.expiry_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_stock_item (rfid_tag, material_id, quantity, batch_no, expiry_date, location, status, in_time) VALUES (#{rfidTag}, #{materialId}, #{quantity}, #{batchNo}, #{expiryDate}, #{location}, #{status}, #{inTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wms_stock_item WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
SELECT * FROM wms_stock_item WHERE rfid_tag = #{rfidTag}

SELECT s.*, l.name as location_name, z.name as zone_name, m.name as material_name FROM wms_stock_item s LEFT JOIN wms_location l ON s.location = l.id LEFT JOIN wms_location z ON l.parent_id = z.id LEFT JOIN wms_material m ON s.material_id = m.material_id WHERE s.material_id = #{materialId} AND s.status = 1 ORDER BY s.expiry_date ASC
SELECT * FROM wms_stock_item WHERE expiry_date <= #{date} ORDER BY expiry_date ASC
SELECT * FROM wms_stock_item WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY expiry_date ASC
SELECT * FROM wms_stock_item WHERE status = 4 OR (expiry_date < CURDATE() AND status != 2)
SELECT * FROM wms_stock_item WHERE status = 1 AND expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY expiry_date ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_stock_item WHERE status = 1 AND expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
SELECT * FROM wms_stock_item WHERE location = #{location} AND status = 1 ORDER BY expiry_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_stock_item SET status = #{status} WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
UPDATE wms_stock_item SET status = #{status} WHERE rfid_tag = #{rfidTag}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_stock_item WHERE status = 1 AND material_id IN
#{id}

SELECT m.material_id as materialId, m.name as materialName, c.category_name as categoryName, m.min_stock as minStock, m.max_stock as maxStock, m.unit as unit, m.image_url as imageUrl, COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) as quantity, MIN(s.expiry_date) as nearestExpiryDate FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_category c ON m.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN wms_stock_item s ON m.material_id = s.material_id AND s.status = 1 GROUP BY m.material_id, m.name, c.category_name, m.min_stock, m.max_stock, m.unit, m.image_url LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_material

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT m.material_id FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_stock_item s ON m.material_id = s.material_id AND s.status = 1 GROUP BY m.material_id, m.min_stock HAVING COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) <= COALESCE(m.min_stock, 0) ) AS low_stock_items

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT m.material_id FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_stock_item s ON m.material_id = s.material_id AND s.status = 1 GROUP BY m.material_id, m.max_stock HAVING COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) > m.max_stock ) AS over_stock_items
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM wms_stock_item WHERE status = 1

SELECT m.name AS materialName, m.min_stock AS minStock, m.unit AS unit, COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) AS currentStock FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_stock_item s ON m.material_id = s.material_id AND s.status = 1 WHERE m.material_id = #{materialId} GROUP BY m.material_id, m.name, m.min_stock, m.unit

SELECT m.material_id AS materialId, m.name AS materialName, m.min_stock AS minStock, m.unit AS unit, COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) AS currentStock FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_stock_item s ON m.material_id = s.material_id AND s.status = 1 WHERE m.min_stock IS NOT NULL AND m.min_stock > 0 GROUP BY m.material_id, m.name, m.min_stock, m.unit HAVING currentStock < m.min_stock

SELECT m.material_id AS materialId, m.name AS materialName, m.max_stock AS maxStock, m.unit AS unit, COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) AS currentStock FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_stock_item s ON m.material_id = s.material_id AND s.status = 1 WHERE m.max_stock IS NOT NULL AND m.max_stock > 0 GROUP BY m.material_id, m.name, m.max_stock, m.unit HAVING currentStock > m.max_stock
SELECT * FROM wms_stock_item WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY in_time DESC LIMIT 1
